AuditEvent.description: Redacted event suitable for persistence and the UI event strip.
AuditEvent.title: AuditEvent

ClaimData.description: The complete draft payload and deterministic required-field result.
ClaimData.title: ClaimData

ClaimPacket.description: Canonical evidence-linked claim draft consumed by every subsystem.
ClaimPacket.title: ClaimPacket

ClaimScope.description: Immutable sandbox and final-action authority boundary.
ClaimScope.title: ClaimScope

ClarificationAnswerRequest.description: Exact user answer bound to the clarification and optimistic case version.
ClarificationAnswerRequest.title: ClarificationAnswerRequest

ClarificationView.description: One active typed clarification without the user's answer value.
ClarificationView.title: ClarificationView

ClarificationWorkflowEvent.description: Content-free clarification lifecycle event with an explicit finite round.
ClarificationWorkflowEvent.title: ClarificationWorkflowEvent

DeterministicEvalExpectation.description: A binary or structured check that never delegates to a model grader.
DeterministicEvalExpectation.title: DeterministicEvalExpectation

EvalCase.description: Versioned eval input and ground truth, usable without a live model.
EvalCase.title: EvalCase

EvalCaseResult.description: One case result whose deterministic failures cannot be overridden.
EvalCaseResult.title: EvalCaseResult

EvalCheckResult.description: One closed metric check with grader failure separate from observed gates.
EvalCheckResult.title: EvalCheckResult

EvalExpectation.description: Complete, machine-readable ground truth for an eval case.
EvalExpectation.title: EvalExpectation

EvalFailureCode.description: Why a grader failed, separate from observed product gate reasons.
EvalFailureCode.title: EvalFailureCode

EvalGraderType.description: Authority class for one evaluation check.
EvalGraderType.title: EvalGraderType

EvalInput.description: Non-sensitive fixture references and natural-language input.
EvalInput.title: EvalInput

EvalMetricAggregate.description: One required closed metric aggregate with explicit denominator semantics.
EvalMetricAggregate.title: EvalMetricAggregate

EvalMetricId.description: Closed release metrics required in every v2 eval run summary.
EvalMetricId.title: EvalMetricId

EvalMetricStatus.description: Aggregate result, including denominator-free not-applicable metrics.
EvalMetricStatus.title: EvalMetricStatus

EvalRunSummary.description: Closed aggregate bound to a dataset digest and source commit.
EvalRunSummary.title: EvalRunSummary

EvidenceFact.description: A bounded fact with explicit support status and source references.
EvidenceFact.title: EvidenceFact

EvidenceItem.description: A local, content-addressed evidence input approved for the active case.
EvidenceItem.title: EvidenceItem

ExpectedGateDecision.description: Expected deterministic outcome for one gate in an eval case.
ExpectedGateDecision.title: ExpectedGateDecision

FactExpectation.description: Ground truth for one allowed evidence fact.
FactExpectation.title: FactExpectation

FactStatus.description: How strongly an evidence fact is supported.
FactStatus.title: FactStatus

FieldProvenance.description: All source pointers supporting one portal-writable claim field.
FieldProvenance.title: FieldProvenance

GateDecision.description: Immutable gate event; model signals can only add a block.
GateDecision.title: GateDecision

GateReasonCode.description: Machine-readable deterministic reasons for blocking a gate.
GateReasonCode.title: GateReasonCode

ModelGradeResult.description: Supplementary quality result with no deterministic-gate authority.
ModelGradeResult.title: ModelGradeResult

ModelGraderExpectation.description: Quality-only threshold; it has no authority over deterministic gates.
ModelGraderExpectation.title: ModelGraderExpectation

OperationalFailureWorkflowEvent.description: Sanitized provider failure kept separate from deterministic gate history.
OperationalFailureWorkflowEvent.title: OperationalFailureWorkflowEvent

PlanStepWorkflowEvent.description: Sanitized plan selection; reasons and arguments are not persisted.
PlanStepWorkflowEvent.title: PlanStepWorkflowEvent

PortalDraftFields.description: Closed set of fields writable in the V1 local sandbox portal.
PortalDraftFields.title: PortalDraftFields

PortalFillWorkflowEvent.description: Portal write metadata containing field names but never field values.
PortalFillWorkflowEvent.title: PortalFillWorkflowEvent

PortalReviewFields.description: Complete values required on a freshly rendered review page.
PortalReviewFields.title: PortalReviewFields

PortalSessionView.description: Versioned portal state used for optimistic-concurrency checks.
PortalSessionView.title: PortalSessionView

PortalState.description: States exposed by the local sandbox portal.
PortalState.title: PortalState

PortalValueExpectation.description: Exact portal value and its expected source pointers.
PortalValueExpectation.title: PortalValueExpectation

PortalVariant.description: Closed visual variants supported by the local sandbox portal.
PortalVariant.title: PortalVariant

ProvenanceRef.description: Stable pointer from a fact or claim field to one evidence item.
ProvenanceRef.title: ProvenanceRef

ProviderCallWorkflowEvent.description: Value-free successful provider-call telemetry for OBS projections.
ProviderCallWorkflowEvent.title: ProviderCallWorkflowEvent

ProviderCostSnapshot.description: Optional USD estimate bound to an explicit pricing snapshot.
ProviderCostSnapshot.title: ProviderCostSnapshot

ProviderFailure.description: Sanitized provider outcome that is operational metadata, never a gate.
ProviderFailure.title: ProviderFailure

ProviderFailureCategory.description: Sanitized provider failure categories safe for persisted workflow events.
ProviderFailureCategory.title: ProviderFailureCategory

ProviderModelId.description: Exact V1 model identities allowed in value-free provider telemetry.
ProviderModelId.title: ProviderModelId

ProviderUsageSnapshot.description: Integer-only usage counters with no provider request content.
ProviderUsageSnapshot.title: ProviderUsageSnapshot

ReleaseDecision.description: Final release result derived from separated deterministic, model, and human inputs.
ReleaseDecision.title: ReleaseDecision

RenderedPortalSnapshot.description: Fresh review-page values consumed by independent verification.
RenderedPortalSnapshot.title: RenderedPortalSnapshot

RetryWorkflowEvent.description: The single V1 controlled retry, separate from clarification rounds.
RetryWorkflowEvent.title: RetryWorkflowEvent

SandboxReceipt.description: Deliberately redacted proof of a local, human-approved sandbox action.
SandboxReceipt.title: SandboxReceipt

SandboxReceiptSummary.description: Closed redacted summary containing counts and authority flags only.
SandboxReceiptSummary.title: SandboxReceiptSummary

StateWorkflowEvent.description: Validated case-state transition without a free-form detail payload.
StateWorkflowEvent.title: StateWorkflowEvent

ToolCallStatus.description: Persistable result of a bounded tool invocation.
ToolCallStatus.title: ToolCallStatus

ToolCallWorkflowEvent.description: Sanitized tool-call lifecycle event without arguments or outputs.
ToolCallWorkflowEvent.title: ToolCallWorkflowEvent

ToolInvocation.description: One bounded invocation with no model-controlled case ID, URL, or field value.
ToolInvocation.title: ToolInvocation

ToolInvocationArguments.description: V1 arguments are intentionally empty and resolved by trusted server state.
ToolInvocationArguments.title: ToolInvocationArguments

ToolPlan.description: Ordered plan whose type surface cannot express submission authority.
ToolPlan.title: ToolPlan

TranscriptConfirmationRequest.description: Human confirmation bound to the displayed transcript bytes and version.
TranscriptConfirmationRequest.title: TranscriptConfirmationRequest

TranscriptConfirmationView.description: Exact transcript content shown to a human before it may become evidence.
TranscriptConfirmationView.title: TranscriptConfirmationView

VerificationAttempt.description: One of at most two attempts; only a final attempt may carry G8.
VerificationAttempt.title: VerificationAttempt

VerificationAttemptSeries.description: Complete one- or two-attempt chain proving a narrow single repair.
VerificationAttemptSeries.title: VerificationAttemptSeries

VerificationFieldResult.description: Fresh rendered-value comparison for one required portal field.
VerificationFieldResult.title: VerificationFieldResult

VerificationRepairMetadata.description: Single-field, single-use repair authorization derived from trusted evidence.
VerificationRepairMetadata.title: VerificationRepairMetadata

VerificationReport.description: Deterministic comparison plus an optional additional model block.
VerificationReport.title: VerificationReport

VerificationState.description: Outcome of the independent verification pass.
VerificationState.title: VerificationState

VerificationWorkflowEvent.description: Value-free verification summary with explicit finality and repair usage.
VerificationWorkflowEvent.title: VerificationWorkflowEvent

WorkflowCaseView.description: Versioned case identity and state without legacy free-form snapshots.
WorkflowCaseView.title: WorkflowCaseView

WorkflowEventEnvelope.description: Read-only redacted projection bound to canonical audit truth.
WorkflowEventEnvelope.title: WorkflowEventEnvelope

WorkflowOperation.description: Closed operations that may be retried or fail operationally.
WorkflowOperation.title: WorkflowOperation

WorkflowSnapshot.description: Canonical HTTP snapshot with state-bound, closed nested payloads.
WorkflowSnapshot.title: WorkflowSnapshot

description: JSON Schema 2020-12 catalog compatible with the OpenAPI 3.1 schema dialect.
title: ClaimDone canonical contracts
